indicators: Evidence shows unfixed behavior in production
rootCauses: Hot reload not applied to running process
Wrong component being used in production
Multiple similar components with different fix status
Developer created new fixed component but didn't update imports
Lack of single source of truth

preventionStrategies.implementation: Test fixes against actual running browser instance
Maintain single source terminal component instead of multiple versions
Automated tests that verify fixes are active in production environment
Force browser refresh after code changes to ensure latest code is loaded

correctionPatterns.description: When multiple component versions exist, identify which one is actually used in production and apply fixes there
After applying fixes, force full browser refresh to bypass hot reload cache
Search codebase for all imports and usages to identify which component version is active
